chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1348 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 16.04.2025 Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani Assistant PG. -.-.-. In the early hours this case was called when the Counsel for the Applicant/Accused was called absent and that was the position on last past two dates however as pointed out by the IO present in the Court on the last date of hearing stating that the Applicant/Accused has been acquitted from the main case and perhaps that was the reason Counsel for the accused was not appearing since last many dates. Same being the case today, on the directions of this Court learned APG stated that he shall verify and confirm from the Trial Court regarding any acquittal Order. For the said reason the matter was kept aside and now the matter has been taken up again and learned APG has filed a case diary which clearly mentions that the present Applicant/Accused was acquitted u/s 249-A Cr.P.C. by the learned Trial Court and his release Order was also issued if not required in any other case. In such circumstances, I am of the opinion that the matter cannot be kept lingering on as the purpose of this Bail Application has been served and has become infructuous therefore present Bail Application is dismissed as infructuous. J U D G E Ali Haider
